attributes.description: Distinct documents completed per minute, grouped by engine instance. Shows whether one instance is starved or hot.
attributes.title: Pipestream / Throughput per instance

attributes.description: p50 / p95 / p99 of duration_ms per module_id. Order by p95 desc.
attributes.title: Pipestream / Step latency p50/p95/p99

attributes.description: Fraction of step executions that ended in PARTIAL status, per module. High values mean modules are silently degrading throughput via partial failures.
attributes.title: Pipestream / PARTIAL rate per module

attributes.description: Top 50 documents by end-to-end wall-clock latency = max(event_timestamp) - min(event_timestamp). Outliers point at one slow step.
attributes.title: Pipestream / Slowest docs end-to-end

attributes.description: Pipestream pipeline-events overview. Per-instance throughput, per-module latency percentiles, per-module PARTIAL rate, slowest documents end-to-end. Uses pipeline-events-* index pattern; honors the dashboard time picker via event_timestamp.
attributes.title: Pipestream / Pipeline Events
